name: Baked Zucchini with Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Core, seed, and chop the pepper. Peel and finely chop the onion. Trim ends off the zucchini and remove the stem end from the tomatoes. Cut all vegetables into 1/2-inch slices.
2. Arrange the vegetable slices in a buttered baking dish, overlapping slightly and alternating tomato with zucchini pieces.
3. Scatter the chopped green pepper, onion, salt, and pepper over the sliced vegetables.
4. Drizzle olive oil evenly over the vegetables.
5. Bake, uncovered, for about 25 minutes, or until the squash is crisp-tender. You can substitute yellow squash if desired. This dish can be prepared ahead and baked just before serving.
